title: parianella lanceolata
intro: Parianella lanceolata, also known as the Cape daisy, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. The medicinal properties of Parianella lanceolata include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its essential oil and flavonoid content. The health benefits of the plant include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as providing potential protection against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of Parianella lanceolata include tea infusions and essential oil extracts, which can be used topically or internally for therapeutic purposes.
